card_description: OCCP is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick formalizes the "Ham Sandwich" model of reality: Man - World - God."

linked_segments.summary: Dick synthesizes the messages of his core novels (*Ubik*, *Stigmata*, *Maze*) into a single Gnostic revelation: we are in a mass-hallucinated prison, and a ubiquitous deity (Ubik/Zebra) is "invading"
